shellCommands.command: /bin/bash -lc "sed -n '1,240p' .agents/skills/mempal-memory/SKILL.md && printf '\\n--- status ---\\n' && git status --short && printf '\\n--- files ---\\n' && rg --files | head -80"
/bin/bash -lc 'mempal search "react-tooltip touchstart delegated events delayed show scroll resize close" --json --top-k 5'

/bin/bash -lc "sed -n '1,280p' src/components/Tooltip/use-tooltip-events.tsx && printf '\\n--- delegation ---\\n' && sed -n '1,320p' src/components/Tooltip/event-delegation.ts && printf '\\n--- tooltip refs ---\\n' && rg -n \"scroll|resize|showDelay|delay|touch|mouseenter|mouseover|hide|clearTimeout|timeout\" src/components/Tooltip src/test/tooltip-close-and-delay-behavior.spec.tsx src/test/tooltip-interaction-behavior.spec.js 2>/dev/null"

/bin/bash -lc "sed -n '280,580p' src/components/Tooltip/use-tooltip-events.tsx && sed -n '250,330p' src/components/Tooltip/Tooltip.tsx && sed -n '1,130p' src/utils/debounce.ts && sed -n '70,190p' src/test/tooltip-interaction-behavior.spec.js && cat package.json"

/bin/bash -lc "rg -n \"touch|openEvents|touchstart\" src README.md CHANGELOG.md | head -160 && sed -n '1,130p' src/components/Tooltip/TooltipTypes.d.ts && rg -n \"useTooltipEvents\" src/components/Tooltip/Tooltip.tsx && sed -n '420,470p' src/components/Tooltip/Tooltip.tsx"

/bin/bash -lc "rg -n \"touch\" . --glob '"'!yarn.lock'"' --glob '"'!node_modules/**'"' --glob '"'!__niceeval__/**'"' | head -100; sed -n '1,90p' src/test/tooltip-interaction-behavior.spec.js; sed -n '1,120p' src/test/test-utils.js; sed -n '1,120p' src/components/Tooltip/Tooltip.tsx"

/bin/bash -lc 'mkdir -p "$HOME/.mempal-notes" && cat > "$HOME/.mempal-notes/react-tooltip-touch-scroll-race.md" <<'"'EOF'
# Invalidate delegated tooltip opens on touch and global close

When a tooltip relies on delegated hover/focus events, touch-only browsers need an explicit delegated "'`touchstart` opener because they may not synthesize mouse or focus events. Global close events such as scroll and resize must cancel both the debounce gate and the show-delay timer before closing, or an already queued open can run afterward and resurrect the tooltip.
EOF
mempal ingest "$HOME/.mempal-notes" --wing memory-evals'

errors: `--dangerously-bypass-hook-trust` is enabled. Enabled hooks may run without review for this invocation.
